panels.description: Daily active users in the selected team(s)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.user_login) as "Daily Active Users"
FROM _tool_copilot_user_daily_metrics m
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_team_users tu
  ON tu.connection_id = m.connection_id AND tu.user_login = m.user_login
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_teams t
  ON t.connection_id = tu.connection_id AND t.id = tu.team_id
WHERE m.connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND m.scope_id = '${scope_id}'
  AND m.day = (
    SELECT MAX(day) FROM _tool_copilot_user_daily_metrics
    WHERE connection_id = ${connection_id} AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'
  )
  AND ('${team:raw}' = 'All' OR t.slug = '${team:raw}')

panels.title: Daily Active Users

panels.description: Code acceptance rate for the selected team(s) in the time range

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(SUM(m.code_acceptance_activity_count) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(m.code_generation_activity_count), 0), 1) as "Acceptance Rate %"
FROM _tool_copilot_user_daily_metrics m
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_team_users tu
  ON tu.connection_id = m.connection_id AND tu.user_login = m.user_login
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_teams t
  ON t.connection_id = tu.connection_id AND t.id = tu.team_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(m.day)
  AND m.connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND m.scope_id = '${scope_id}'
  AND ('${team:raw}' = 'All' OR t.slug = '${team:raw}')

panels.title: Code Acceptance Rate

panels.description: Total lines of code added by team members in the time range

targets.rawSql:
SELECT SUM(m.loc_added_sum) as "Lines Added"
FROM _tool_copilot_user_daily_metrics m
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_team_users tu
  ON tu.connection_id = m.connection_id AND tu.user_login = m.user_login
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_teams t
  ON t.connection_id = tu.connection_id AND t.id = tu.team_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(m.day)
  AND m.connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND m.scope_id = '${scope_id}'
  AND ('${team:raw}' = 'All' OR t.slug = '${team:raw}')

panels.title: Lines of Code Added

panels.description: Total user-initiated interactions in the time range

targets.rawSql:
SELECT SUM(m.user_initiated_interaction_count) as "User-Initiated Interactions"
FROM _tool_copilot_user_daily_metrics m
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_team_users tu
  ON tu.connection_id = m.connection_id AND tu.user_login = m.user_login
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_teams t
  ON t.connection_id = tu.connection_id AND t.id = tu.team_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(m.day)
  AND m.connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND m.scope_id = '${scope_id}'
  AND ('${team:raw}' = 'All' OR t.slug = '${team:raw}')

panels.title: User-Initiated Interactions

panels.description: Weekly active users in the selected team(s)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.user_login) as "Weekly Active Users"
FROM _tool_copilot_user_daily_metrics m
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_team_users tu
  ON tu.connection_id = m.connection_id AND tu.user_login = m.user_login
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_teams t
  ON t.connection_id = tu.connection_id AND t.id = tu.team_id
WHERE m.day >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
  AND m.connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND m.scope_id = '${scope_id}'
  AND ('${team:raw}' = 'All' OR t.slug = '${team:raw}')

panels.title: Weekly Active Users (WAU)

panels.description: Monthly active users in the selected team(s)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.user_login) as "Monthly Active Users"
FROM _tool_copilot_user_daily_metrics m
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_team_users tu
  ON tu.connection_id = m.connection_id AND tu.user_login = m.user_login
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_teams t
  ON t.connection_id = tu.connection_id AND t.id = tu.team_id
WHERE m.day >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 28 DAY)
  AND m.connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND m.scope_id = '${scope_id}'
  AND ('${team:raw}' = 'All' OR t.slug = '${team:raw}')

panels.title: Monthly Active Users (MAU)

panels.description: Unique users with Copilot activity in the time range

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.user_login) as "Unique Users"
FROM _tool_copilot_user_daily_metrics m
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_team_users tu
  ON tu.connection_id = m.connection_id AND tu.user_login = m.user_login
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_teams t
  ON t.connection_id = tu.connection_id AND t.id = tu.team_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(m.day)
  AND m.connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND m.scope_id = '${scope_id}'
  AND ('${team:raw}' = 'All' OR t.slug = '${team:raw}')

panels.title: Unique Users (Period)

panels.description: Seat utilization for team members

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COUNT(CASE WHEN s.last_activity_at IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) as "Utilization %"
FROM _tool_copilot_seats s
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_team_users tu
  ON tu.connection_id = s.connection_id AND tu.user_login = s.user_login
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_teams t
  ON t.connection_id = tu.connection_id AND t.id = tu.team_id
WHERE s.connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND ('${team:raw}' = 'All' OR t.slug = '${team:raw}')

panels.title: Seat Utilization

panels.description: Active users over time for the selected team(s)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT m.day as time,
  COUNT(DISTINCT m.user_login) as "Active Users"
FROM _tool_copilot_user_daily_metrics m
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_team_users tu
  ON tu.connection_id = m.connection_id AND tu.user_login = m.user_login
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_teams t
  ON t.connection_id = tu.connection_id AND t.id = tu.team_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(m.day)
  AND m.connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND m.scope_id = '${scope_id}'
  AND ('${team:raw}' = 'All' OR t.slug = '${team:raw}')
GROUP BY m.day
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Active Users Over Time

panels.description: Code suggestions generated vs accepted over time for team members

targets.rawSql:
SELECT m.day as time,
  SUM(m.code_generation_activity_count) as "Suggestions",
  SUM(m.code_acceptance_activity_count) as "Acceptances"
FROM _tool_copilot_user_daily_metrics m
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_team_users tu
  ON tu.connection_id = m.connection_id AND tu.user_login = m.user_login
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_teams t
  ON t.connection_id = tu.connection_id AND t.id = tu.team_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(m.day)
  AND m.connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND m.scope_id = '${scope_id}'
  AND ('${team:raw}' = 'All' OR t.slug = '${team:raw}')
GROUP BY m.day
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Code Suggestions & Acceptances

panels.description: Lines of code suggested vs added over time for team members

targets.rawSql:
SELECT m.day as time,
  SUM(m.loc_suggested_to_add_sum) as "LOC Suggested",
  SUM(m.loc_added_sum) as "LOC Added"
FROM _tool_copilot_user_daily_metrics m
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_team_users tu
  ON tu.connection_id = m.connection_id AND tu.user_login = m.user_login
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_teams t
  ON t.connection_id = tu.connection_id AND t.id = tu.team_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(m.day)
  AND m.connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND m.scope_id = '${scope_id}'
  AND ('${team:raw}' = 'All' OR t.slug = '${team:raw}')
GROUP BY m.day
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: LOC Suggested vs LOC Added Over Time

panels.description: Daily acceptance rate trend for team members

targets.rawSql:
SELECT m.day as time,
  SUM(m.code_acceptance_activity_count) / NULLIF(SUM(m.code_generation_activity_count), 0) as "Acceptance Rate"
FROM _tool_copilot_user_daily_metrics m
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_team_users tu
  ON tu.connection_id = m.connection_id AND tu.user_login = m.user_login
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_teams t
  ON t.connection_id = tu.connection_id AND t.id = tu.team_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(m.day)
  AND m.connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND m.scope_id = '${scope_id}'
  AND ('${team:raw}' = 'All' OR t.slug = '${team:raw}')
GROUP BY m.day
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Overall Acceptance Rate Trend

panels.description: Side-by-side comparison of key metrics across all teams

targets.rawSql:
SELECT t.name as "Team",
  COUNT(DISTINCT m.user_login) as "Active Users",
  SUM(m.code_generation_activity_count) as "Suggestions",
  SUM(m.code_acceptance_activity_count) as "Acceptances",
  ROUND(SUM(m.code_acceptance_activity_count) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(m.code_generation_activity_count), 0), 1) as "Acceptance %",
  SUM(m.loc_added_sum) as "LOC Added",
  SUM(m.user_initiated_interaction_count) as "Interactions",
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN m.used_agent = 1 THEN m.user_login END) as "Agent Adopters",
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN m.used_chat = 1 THEN m.user_login END) as "Chat Adopters"
FROM _tool_copilot_user_daily_metrics m
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_team_users tu
  ON tu.connection_id = m.connection_id AND tu.user_login = m.user_login
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_teams t
  ON t.connection_id = tu.connection_id AND t.id = tu.team_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(m.day)
  AND m.connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND m.scope_id = '${scope_id}'
  AND ('${team:raw}' = 'All' OR t.slug = '${team:raw}')
GROUP BY t.name
ORDER BY SUM(m.code_generation_activity_count) DESC

panels.title: Team Metrics Comparison

panels.description: Weekly active users by team over time

targets.rawSql:
SELECT DATE(DATE_SUB(m.day, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(m.day) DAY)) as time,
  t.name as metric,
  COUNT(DISTINCT m.user_login) as value
FROM _tool_copilot_user_daily_metrics m
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_team_users tu
  ON tu.connection_id = m.connection_id AND tu.user_login = m.user_login
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_teams t
  ON t.connection_id = tu.connection_id AND t.id = tu.team_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(m.day)
  AND m.connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND m.scope_id = '${scope_id}'
  AND ('${team:raw}' = 'All' OR t.slug = '${team:raw}')
GROUP BY time, t.name
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Weekly Active Users by Team

panels.description: Acceptance ratio by language for team members

targets.rawSql:
SELECT lf.language as "Language",
  SUM(lf.code_generation_activity_count) as "Suggestions",
  SUM(lf.code_acceptance_activity_count) as "Acceptances",
  ROUND(SUM(lf.code_acceptance_activity_count) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(lf.code_generation_activity_count), 0), 1) as "Acceptance Rate %"
FROM _tool_copilot_user_metrics_by_language_feature lf
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_user_daily_metrics udm
  ON udm.connection_id = lf.connection_id AND udm.user_id = lf.user_id AND udm.day = lf.day AND udm.scope_id = lf.scope_id
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_team_users tu
  ON tu.connection_id = lf.connection_id AND tu.user_login = udm.user_login
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_teams t
  ON t.connection_id = tu.connection_id AND t.id = tu.team_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(lf.day)
  AND lf.connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND lf.scope_id = '${scope_id}'
  AND ('${team:raw}' = 'All' OR t.slug = '${team:raw}')
GROUP BY lf.language
HAVING SUM(lf.code_generation_activity_count) > 0
ORDER BY ROUND(SUM(lf.code_acceptance_activity_count) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(lf.code_generation_activity_count), 0), 1) DESC
LIMIT 15

panels.title: Top Languages by Acceptance Rate

panels.description: Acceptance ratio by model for team members

targets.rawSql:
SELECT mf.model as "Model",
  SUM(mf.code_generation_activity_count) as "Suggestions",
  SUM(mf.code_acceptance_activity_count) as "Acceptances",
  ROUND(SUM(mf.code_acceptance_activity_count) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(mf.code_generation_activity_count), 0), 1) as "Acceptance Rate %"
FROM _tool_copilot_user_metrics_by_model_feature mf
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_user_daily_metrics udm
  ON udm.connection_id = mf.connection_id AND udm.user_id = mf.user_id AND udm.day = mf.day AND udm.scope_id = mf.scope_id
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_team_users tu
  ON tu.connection_id = mf.connection_id AND tu.user_login = udm.user_login
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_teams t
  ON t.connection_id = tu.connection_id AND t.id = tu.team_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(mf.day)
  AND mf.connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND mf.scope_id = '${scope_id}'
  AND ('${team:raw}' = 'All' OR t.slug = '${team:raw}')
GROUP BY mf.model
HAVING SUM(mf.code_generation_activity_count) > 0
ORDER BY ROUND(SUM(mf.code_acceptance_activity_count) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(mf.code_generation_activity_count), 0), 1) DESC
LIMIT 10

panels.title: Top Models by Acceptance Rate

panels.description: Top users by code generation activity in the selected team(s)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT m.user_login as "user_login",
  t.name as "team",
  SUM(m.code_generation_activity_count) as "suggestions",
  SUM(m.code_acceptance_activity_count) as "acceptances",
  ROUND(SUM(m.code_acceptance_activity_count) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(m.code_generation_activity_count), 0), 1) as "acceptance %"
FROM _tool_copilot_user_daily_metrics m
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_team_users tu
  ON tu.connection_id = m.connection_id AND tu.user_login = m.user_login
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_teams t
  ON t.connection_id = tu.connection_id AND t.id = tu.team_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(m.day)
  AND m.connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND m.scope_id = '${scope_id}'
  AND ('${team:raw}' = 'All' OR t.slug = '${team:raw}')
GROUP BY m.user_login, t.name
HAVING SUM(m.code_generation_activity_count) > 0
ORDER BY SUM(m.code_generation_activity_count) DESC
LIMIT 25

panels.title: Top Users by Code Generations

panels.description: Agent vs chat user trend for team members

targets.rawSql:
SELECT m.day as time,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN m.used_agent = 1 THEN m.user_login END) as "Agent Users",
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN m.used_chat = 1 THEN m.user_login END) as "Chat Users"
FROM _tool_copilot_user_daily_metrics m
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_team_users tu
  ON tu.connection_id = m.connection_id AND tu.user_login = m.user_login
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_teams t
  ON t.connection_id = tu.connection_id AND t.id = tu.team_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(m.day)
  AND m.connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND m.scope_id = '${scope_id}'
  AND ('${team:raw}' = 'All' OR t.slug = '${team:raw}')
GROUP BY m.day
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Agent Users vs Chat Users Trend

panels.description: New active users per day for team members

targets.rawSql:
SELECT first_day as time,
  COUNT(*) as "New Active Users"
FROM (
  SELECT m.user_login,
    MIN(m.day) as first_day
  FROM _tool_copilot_user_daily_metrics m
  INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_team_users tu
    ON tu.connection_id = m.connection_id AND tu.user_login = m.user_login
  INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_teams t
    ON t.connection_id = tu.connection_id AND t.id = tu.team_id
  WHERE m.connection_id = ${connection_id}
    AND m.scope_id = '${scope_id}'
    AND ('${team:raw}' = 'All' OR t.slug = '${team:raw}')
  GROUP BY m.user_login
) first_seen
WHERE $__timeFilter(first_day)
GROUP BY first_day
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: New Active Users per Day

panels.description: Seat activity by editor for team members

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(s.last_activity_editor, ''), 'unknown') as "Editor",
  COUNT(*) as "Seats"
FROM _tool_copilot_seats s
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_team_users tu
  ON tu.connection_id = s.connection_id AND tu.user_login = s.user_login
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_teams t
  ON t.connection_id = tu.connection_id AND t.id = tu.team_id
WHERE s.connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND ('${team:raw}' = 'All' OR t.slug = '${team:raw}')
GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(s.last_activity_editor, ''), 'unknown')
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC

panels.title: Seat Activity by Editor

panels.description: Total, active, and inactive seats for team members

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) as "total_seats",
  SUM(CASE WHEN s.last_activity_at IS NOT NULL AND s.last_activity_at >= DATE_SUB(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as "active_seats",
  SUM(CASE WHEN s.last_activity_at IS NULL OR s.last_activity_at < DATE_SUB(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as "inactive_seats"
FROM _tool_copilot_seats s
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_team_users tu
  ON tu.connection_id = s.connection_id AND tu.user_login = s.user_login
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_teams t
  ON t.connection_id = tu.connection_id AND t.id = tu.team_id
WHERE s.connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND ('${team:raw}' = 'All' OR t.slug = '${team:raw}')

panels.title: Seats Summary

panels.description: Inactive seats for team members

targets.rawSql:
SELECT s.user_login as "user_login",
  t.name as "team",
  s.last_activity_at as "last_activity_at",
  s.plan_type as "plan_type"
FROM _tool_copilot_seats s
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_team_users tu
  ON tu.connection_id = s.connection_id AND tu.user_login = s.user_login
INNER JOIN _tool_copilot_teams t
  ON t.connection_id = tu.connection_id AND t.id = tu.team_id
WHERE s.connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND ('${team:raw}' = 'All' OR t.slug = '${team:raw}')
  AND (s.last_activity_at IS NULL OR s.last_activity_at < DATE_SUB(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 30 DAY))
ORDER BY s.last_activity_at IS NULL DESC, s.last_activity_at ASC
LIMIT 100

panels.title: Inactive Seats

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT connection_id FROM _tool_copilot_scopes ORDER BY connection_id DESC
list.label: Connection ID
list.name: connection_id
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT connection_id FROM _tool_copilot_scopes ORDER BY connection_id DESC

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT id as scope_id FROM _tool_copilot_scopes WHERE connection_id = ${connection_id} ORDER BY 1
list.label: Scope ID
list.name: scope_id
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT id as scope_id FROM _tool_copilot_scopes WHERE connection_id = ${connection_id} ORDER BY 1

list.definition: SELECT slug as __value, name as __text FROM _tool_copilot_teams WHERE connection_id = ${connection_id} ORDER BY name
list.label: Team
list.name: team
list.query: SELECT slug as __value, name as __text FROM _tool_copilot_teams WHERE connection_id = ${connection_id} ORDER BY name
